case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. RICHARD ALFRED LONAKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,340.67 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LONAKER, RICHARD ALFRED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONAKER, RICHARD ALFRED $2,340.67 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,455.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED AUG-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LONAKER, RICHARD ALFRED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RICHARD ALFREDO LONAKER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
